name: Features Check List
description: A two-column 'everything you get' check list designed to sit beside a pricing component. Items render with one of three check styles (filled, outline, minimal) and animate in with a one-shot scale pulse. Items can be flat or grouped under small section headers; a single keyword in each line can be inline-bolded for scannability.

descriptions.descriptive: A high-density two-column list section where every item begins with a stylized check icon and a short line of text. The check icon offers three visual treatments — solid filled circle, outlined ring, or bare glyph — and pulses into view with a spring-driven scale animation on first scroll. An optional inline keyword bold inside each line gives the eye anchors to scan across long lists, and an optional section-header grouping breaks longer lists into named clusters.
descriptions.usage: Drop next to a pricing component (tier cards, monthly/annual toggle, single price) to reinforce 'yes, this is included' for every line of value. Works equally well as a what's-in-the-plan list under a hero or as a deliverables block in a consulting proposal page. Use the grouped variant when the list crosses twelve items and benefits from named buckets like 'Strategy', 'Build', 'Support'.
descriptions.audienceFit: Fits SaaS subscription pages, productised consulting, membership programs, ecommerce bundle pages, and any audience that scans a check list before reading prose. The minimal density and quiet motion keep it credible for B2B and enterprise buyers; the friendly check pulse adds a small reward for indie and SMB readers.
